suite.elevator: Haven Private Elevators (aft) — directly adjacent to your suite. Your Haven keycard activates them.

haven.description: The Haven Private Elevators — aft position, Haven keycard required
haven.note: Fastest and most exclusive. Your suite is directly adjacent to these on Deck 12.

midship.description: Main midship elevator banks — no keycard required, accessible to all guests
midship.note: Good for reaching casino (Deck 9), forward areas, and decks not served by Haven elevators

forward.description: Forward public elevators — no keycard required
forward.note: Alternative to Haven elevators for forward venues

venues.name: The Haven Restaurant
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator (aft, Deck 12) up to Deck 15. Exit aft — The Haven Restaurant is directly ahead. Haven keycard required.
venues.directions_to_suite: Exit The Haven Restaurant, take the Haven elevator down to Deck 12. Turn to your suite — 12846 is starboard side, short walk from the elevator.

venues.name: The Haven Lounge & Bar
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator (aft, Deck 12) up to Deck 15. The Haven Lounge & Bar is adjacent to the restaurant, aft.
venues.directions_to_suite: From the Haven Lounge, take the Haven elevator down to Deck 12. Short walk starboard to suite 12846.

venues.name: The Haven Sundeck & Pool
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator (aft, Deck 12) up to Deck 15. Follow signs aft and up to the Haven Sundeck — private pool, hot tubs, and bar.
venues.directions_to_suite: From the Haven Sundeck, take the Haven elevator down to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is starboard, a short walk from the elevator.

venues.name: The Bull's Eye Bar
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator to Deck 15. The Bull's Eye Bar is in the Haven complex, aft.
venues.directions_to_suite: From Bull's Eye Bar, take the Haven elevator down to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is starboard.

venues.name: Haven Concierge Desk
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator to Deck 15. The Concierge Desk is in the Haven complex — aft, near the restaurant entrance.
venues.directions_to_suite: From the Concierge Desk, take the Haven elevator down to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is a short walk starboard.

venues.name: Mandara Spa & Salon
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator to Deck 15, then take the stairs or midship elevator one deck up to Deck 16. The Mandara Spa entrance is at the aft section of Deck 16. Follow spa signs.
venues.directions_to_suite: From the Mandara Spa, head toward the aft elevators or Haven elevator on Deck 15 (one deck down), then down to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is starboard.

venues.name: Main Pool & Waves Pool Bar
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator to Deck 15, then stairs up to Deck 16, then walk midship to the main pool area. Or use midship elevators to Deck 16.
venues.directions_to_suite: From the main pool, take the stairs or elevator down to Deck 15, then take the Haven elevator down to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is aft-starboard.

venues.name: Surfside Café (Deck 16)
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator to Deck 15, stairs up to Deck 16, walk to the Surfside Café area.
venues.directions_to_suite: From Surfside Café, take the Haven elevator from Deck 15 (one deck down) to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is starboard.

venues.name: Aqua SlideCoaster
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator to Deck 15, stairs up to Deck 16, then walk midship-aft to the Aqua SlideCoaster.
venues.directions_to_suite: From the SlideCoaster area, take the stairs or elevator down to Deck 15, then take the Haven elevator to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is aft-starboard.

venues.name: Casino
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator down to Deck 9. The Casino is midship on Deck 9 — follow signs after exiting the elevator.
venues.directions_to_suite: From the Casino, take the Haven elevator (aft on Deck 9) up to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is aft-starboard.

venues.name: Starbucks®
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator down to Deck 9. Walk midship toward the Penrose Atrium — Starbucks is in the atrium retail area.
venues.directions_to_suite: From Starbucks in the Penrose Atrium, walk aft to the Haven elevator and take it up to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is aft-starboard.

venues.name: Cagney's Steakhouse
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator down to Deck 9. Cagney's Steakhouse is forward on Deck 9, near the Haven elevator exit.
venues.directions_to_suite: From Cagney's, take the Haven elevator up to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is a short walk.

venues.name: Le Bistro
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator down to Deck 9. Le Bistro is forward on Deck 9.
venues.directions_to_suite: From Le Bistro, take the Haven elevator up to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is a short walk.

venues.name: Hasuki (Japanese Teppanyaki)
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator down to Deck 9. Hasuki is midship-forward on Deck 9.
venues.directions_to_suite: From Hasuki, take the Haven elevator up to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is a short walk.

venues.name: Nama Sushi Sashimi
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator down to Deck 9. Nama is forward on Deck 9.
venues.directions_to_suite: From Nama, take the Haven elevator up to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is a short walk.

venues.name: Indulge Food Hall
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator down to Deck 9. Indulge Food Hall is midship on Deck 9.
venues.directions_to_suite: From Indulge, take the Haven elevator up to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is a short walk aft.

venues.name: Syd Norman's Pour House
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator down to Deck 9, then check ship signage for Syd Norman's — typically a dedicated rock/music venue midship on this deck.
venues.directions_to_suite: From Syd Norman's, walk aft to the Haven elevator and take it up to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is aft-starboard.

venues.name: Swirl Wine Bar
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator down to Deck 9. Swirl Wine Bar is midship on Deck 9.
venues.directions_to_suite: From Swirl, take the Haven elevator up to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is aft-starboard.

venues.name: Whiskey Bar
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator down to Deck 9. The Whiskey Bar is midship on Deck 9.
venues.directions_to_suite: From the Whiskey Bar, take the Haven elevator up to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is aft-starboard.

venues.name: Thermal Suite (Mandara Spa)
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator to Deck 15, stairs up to Deck 16. The Thermal Suite is inside Mandara Spa — entrance aft on Deck 16.
venues.directions_to_suite: From the Thermal Suite, exit the spa, head to Deck 15 via stairs, then take the Haven elevator down to Deck 12.

venues.name: Guest Services / Shore Excursions
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator down to Deck 9. Guest Services and Shore Excursions are midship on Deck 9.
venues.directions_to_suite: From Guest Services, take the Haven elevator up to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is aft-starboard.

venues.name: Shops & Boutiques
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator down to Deck 9. Shops & Boutiques are midship on Deck 9 (and some on Deck 13).
venues.directions_to_suite: From the shops, take the Haven elevator up to Deck 12.

venues.name: Observation Lounge
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator to Deck 15. The Observation Lounge is at the forward top of the ship on Deck 15 — panoramic views forward.
venues.directions_to_suite: From the Observation Lounge, take the Haven elevator down to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is starboard.

venues.name: Pulse Fitness Center
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator to Deck 15. The Pulse Fitness Center is forward on Deck 15.
venues.directions_to_suite: From the Fitness Center, take the Haven elevator down to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is starboard.

quick_directions.from_suite_prefix: From Suite 12846: Take the Haven elevator (aft, adjacent to your suite on Deck 12)
quick_directions.to_suite_suffix: Take the Haven elevator back to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is a short walk starboard from the elevator.
quick_directions.note: The Haven elevator uses your Haven keycard. It is faster, private, and the correct elevator for all Haven-complex destinations.
